query:
ALTER TABLE membros_equipe 
ADD COLUMN email VARCHAR(320) NULL,
ADD COLUMN senha VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN acessoTotal BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN permissoes JSON DEFAULT '[]',
ADD COLUMN resetToken VARCHAR(64) NULL,
ADD COLUMN resetTokenExpira TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN ultimoAcesso TIMESTAMP NULL;
